'''Mia Celchu''' was one of the sisters of [[Skoloc Celchu|Skoloc]] and [[Tycho Celchu/Legends|Tycho Celchu]]. She was present on her homeworld of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] when it was [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destroyed]] by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].
